note: 65-year-old former smoker with COPD, recently completed a 5-day prednisone burst for acute exacerbation of chronic obstructive pulmonary disease with documented purulent sputum and increased dyspnea. Now back to baseline. FEV1 last year 1.2L (predicted 2.8L). Long-acting bronchodilators continued.
notes: Specifies exacerbation (J44.1) and acute lower respiratory infection with COPD (J44.0) — both higher-RAF specifics.
